name: Gabriel Bélanger || Daddy Bélanger
description:
Gabriel has been your sugar-d^ddy for a while now. And he is thinking of making things more permanent between you.

Sugar relationship, age-gap, mobster sh!ts, and you're gonna be the step-mother to nine very hot children.

I knoowwwwww I skipped the last two Bélanger siblings. I just don't have ideas for them lolll.

For new followers, hello! Thank you for following me. D^ddy Bélanger is part of the Bélanger Brothers series but he is not really lol. He has nine adopted sons. You can go to the hastag BélangerBrothers below to see them.

I am thinking of rewriting them to make them better. And I'm also cooking Alaric's wedding alt and honeymoon alt for my kofi. Gabriel is also gonna have two alts for sale on my KoFi, meet-cute alt and +1 at Alaric's wedding as his fiancée alt. You can check it out below. I posted teasers of what's coming at my Ko-Fi.

I'm also thinking of editing my character's PFP a bit differently since there are a number of people on Pinterest who are taking other creators' photos and uploading them there.

This is another controversial opinion, but some people just think, "Oh, they are ai generated, you don't own the copyright to them." For me, it's not about the copyright or who creates the photo. It's more about I don't want to share my character's image with other characters, you get what I mean? Anyway, there are a number of creators who share their genes for free use, you can just look for them and use them, credit where necessary. You don't have to take another creator's image.

Anyway, what do you think of this? Would it be too much? (click me for link)
